components.name: vision_patch_embed
components.notes: Conv2d 14x14 stride 14 (3->1536) + RMSNorm(eps=1e-5); temporal_patch_size=1 so plain 2D conv. placement=replicate (vision tower run-once per input; fits in DRAM budget; replication deletes boundary CCL into TP decoder).

components.name: vision_rmsnorm
components.notes: RMSNorm dim=1536 eps=1e-5 (block norms) and eps=1e-6 (merger ln_q is LayerNorm). placement=replicate.

components.name: vision_attention
components.notes: MHA 12 heads, head_dim 128, fused QKV (no bias, use_bias=false), 2D rotary pos emb, full (non-causal, non-windowed) attention with cu_seqlens block mask. placement=replicate; rot_pos_emb/cu_seqlens computed on host like qwen25_vl.

components.name: vision_block
components.notes: Pre-norm residual block: x + attn(norm1(x)); x + mlp(norm2(x)). 42 layers, all full attention (no window/full alternation unlike qwen25_vl). placement=replicate.

components.name: patch_merger
components.notes: LayerNorm(1536, eps=1e-6) -> view(-1, 6144) -> Linear 6144->6144 -> GELU -> Linear 6144->1536. spatial_merge_size=2. placement=replicate.

components.name: vision_transformer
components.notes: Full DotsVisionTransformer: patch_embed -> 42x vision_block -> post_trunk_norm -> merger. ~1.26B params bf16 ~2.5GB. placement=replicate (run-once per image; replicated output feeds column-parallel decoder with no CCL).

components.name: embedding
components.notes: vocab 151936 x 1536, untied from lm_head. placement=shard (per-token cadence); shard vocab dim with all-reduce, tt_transformers pattern. Image embeds scattered into text embeds at image_token_id=151665 positions.

components.name: text_rmsnorm
components.notes: RMSNorm dim=1536 eps=1e-6. placement=shard (distributed norm per tt_transformers distributed_norm.py); weights replicated.

components.name: text_attention
components.notes: Qwen2-style GQA: 12 Q heads, 2 KV heads, head_dim 128, QKV bias=true, o_proj no bias, RoPE theta=1e6, 28 layers. placement=shard 4-way (3 Q heads/chip); kv_replication=2 (each KV head replicated on 2 chips so SDPA stays chip-local; do NOT copy divisibility assert).

components.name: text_mlp
components.notes: SwiGLU 1536->8960->1536 no bias. placement=shard (gate/up column-parallel, down row-parallel + all-reduce).

components.name: decoder_layer
components.notes: Pre-norm: input_layernorm -> attn -> residual; post_attention_layernorm -> mlp -> residual. 28 layers. placement=shard.

components.name: lm_head
components.notes: 1536 -> 151936, no bias, untied. placement=shard vocab dim; concat logits on host or all_gather.

use_cases.name: ocr
use_cases.description: Document OCR / layout parsing: image plus text prompt in, structured text (markdown/JSON) out via autoregressive decode.
use_cases.hybrid_notes: Image preprocessing (resize, patchify, grid_thw) and tokenizer/chat-template stay on HF host; rot_pos_emb tables and cu_seqlens computed on host.
